title: cymbolaena griffithii
intro: Cymbolaena griffithii, also known as the Griffith's cactus daisy, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of India and Pakistan. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cymbolaena griffithii include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
